prompt: What's in my donjon.agency folder? Can you map it out and tell me what's old enough to archive?

assertions.description: Produces a multi-level directory map showing the folder structure with annotations
Organizes archive candidates into priority tiers (not just a flat list), explaining the signal/reason for each
Handles the case where no files are 90+ days old gracefully (uses content signals instead of just timestamp filtering)
Identifies and calls out empty directories (anna/, Donjon_Images/, tasks/, Private & Shared/) as cleanup candidates
Identifies the Jacob-facing PDFs and ZIPs at root as deliverable archive candidates
Generates or includes INDEX.md-style content (structured map with annotations per folder)
